pi_items.source: Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies exact product name to create
Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies exact SKU to create
Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies Regular Price as $45.99

Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies category; verified that Accessories category is created during environment setup (setup_woocommerce.sh line 231: wp wc product_cat create --name="Accessories")
Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies 'simple product'; verified as valid WooCommerce product type in verifier.py and task_utils.sh (get_product_type function)
Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies 'Publish the product when done'; verified as valid WordPress post status used in verifier.py and task_utils.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task specifies creation of a synthetic product 'Handcrafted Leather Wallet' with SKU 'HLW-BRN-01', price $45.99, type 'simple', in the 'Accessories' category, with publish status. All metadata values match the task description exactly. The Accessories category is created during environment setup. Simple product type and publish status are valid WooCommerce attributes confirmed in the verifier and utility scripts. This product does not exist in pre-loaded sample data.
